range_a1z30_values: Entity: G&B  ·  Tick the week boxes you're actively working on each milestone — the row builds into a Gantt bar

Distinct from Intermediary Target List per feedback_marketplace_vs_broker_distinction. Marketplaces (platforms): Axial (filter state in project_axial_buyside_filter_state), Flippa, BizBuySell, Quiet Light, Rejigg, Viking, Everingham & Kerr, DealForce, IAG M&A Advisors, SMB Deal Hunter. Live in deal-aggregator skill's Source Scorecard today. OPEN: graduate list into own tracker tab?

Sheet 18zzE1y-BU1xuD-y0BOmEl8GtJ4I-iclSuBqAi0q3pkk. Dedup, classify by firm-type per feedback_classify_intermediary_by_self_id (broker / IB / lawyer / CPA / FO / association). Mark engagement-fee policy per feedback_buyside_advisor_success_fee_only. Franchise rule: one row per firm per feedback_franchise_firm_one_entry_only.

Pull 50 from Intermediary Target List. Megan Lawlor pattern (one-pager attached, plain-text body per project_broker_email_one_pager_only). Route through outreach-manager Subagent 3 (intermediary outreach). Templates from G&B Intermediary Email Templates Doc 1gTQoCbaX8IyrTDli4Xd6IBtCqCT-DwciOUnNmgv0_J4 per feedback_no_intermediary_drafts_outside_template. NO geography in body per feedback_geography_not_in_external_broker_copy.
Same 50 names as email batch. Connect-request notes (300 char) per LinkedIn 3rd-degree mechanics. Lead with searcher peer-signal per user_outreach_voice_kay_canonical_phrases.

Confirm email-intelligence Active Deal Fast-Path catches deal-specific broker emails. Trigger: known broker sender + attachment or deal terms in body. Side effects: folder creation, Drive filing, Attio stage update at 'Financials Received', Slack ping. Test with a known broker BLAST this period.

Confirm email-intelligence artifact Section 7 fires on multi-listing broker BLASTs. Lisa @ Generational Equity, Helen Guo SMB Deal Hunter, Viking, Sunbelt, Transworld are known multi-listing senders. Test: pull last 4 weeks' broker BLASTs, count listings written to artifact, verify decomposition (no collapsed multi-listing rows).

Broker meetings from conferences (ACG NY WOL Summit Thu 5/14, Mid Search Summit week of 5/18, others) feed into Pipeline via conference-engagement skill (already exists). Verify post-conference T+2 followup flow routes broker contacts into Intermediary Target List or directly Attio.

New dashboard tile: # broker emails sent (cumulative + this period), # broker replies, # broker meetings booked, # CIMs received from broker channel, # active deals at LOI from broker channel. Sourcing data from email-intelligence artifact, Attio, deal-evaluation outputs.

NOT pipeline-manager — jj-snapshot-refresh scheduled job (Mon-Fri 9am, 2:30pm, 6pm via systemd timer) reads JJ's per-niche target sheets, writes brain/context/jj-activity-snapshot.json, dashboard reads. Status check: systemctl --user list-timers | grep jj-snapshot-refresh. Verify: dashboard JJ tile reflects today's calls; if stale, fix snapshot job.

KeyReach bundled into DealsX per project_keyreach_dealsx_relationship. Sam Singh's platform has separate send/reply tracking. OPEN QUESTION: ask Sam if DealsX/KeyReach exposes a REST API (preferred) per feedback_integration_priority_mcp_api_local. If yes -> build dealsx-snapshot-refresh mirroring jj-snapshot pattern. If no -> weekly manual CSV export until they ship API. Sam touchpoint: next DealsX coordination call.

Calder Capital fee structure verification — confirm SUCCESS-FEE ONLY per feedback_buyside_advisor_success_fee_only. First call agenda: confirm fee model, sourcing access, deal-flow capacity. Walk away if any retainer/engagement fee. If clean -> engage as fourth source channel alongside proprietary + brokered + marketplace.

Conversion analysis: top broker sources by # deals to LOI per quarter. Re-engage high-yield brokers with quarterly check-in. Retire dead (no response after N attempts). Formalize the cadence as recurring quarterly task.

Currently lives in `deal-aggregator` skill's Source Scorecard. Decision: graduate to own tracker tab (visibility + Kay can edit directly) OR leave embedded in skill scorecard. Per feedback_marketplace_vs_broker_distinction. Prerequisite to milestone 1 (Marketplace inventory audit).

Pending per feedback_broker_channel_opportunistic_floor (Kay 5/3 rejected relaxed-floor approach; geo window still open). Geography itself stays internal per feedback_geography_not_in_external_broker_copy (never in broker email body), but must be locked for buy-box routing logic. Prerequisite to milestone 3 (50 broker email batch).
Sam Singh touchpoint — DealsX API + KeyReach integration discovery

Ask Sam: does DealsX/KeyReach expose a REST API with API-key auth (preferred path per feedback_integration_priority_mcp_api_local)? Determines milestone 10 path: API → build `dealsx-snapshot-refresh` mirroring `jj-snapshot-refresh`; no API → manual weekly CSV import cadence. Schedule via next DealsX coordination call or async LinkedIn DM.
